title: Monday Docs AI search

posts.author: craighellen (craig@bexmedia.net)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We use monday docs to author all our SOPs,
It would be so useful to have an AI enabled search method so if a user asks a question, it would use ai to bring up all the relevant docs that relate to the question. EVEN if the doc doesn’t have any of the words from the search query it would still be able to deliver relevant results.

Silly example:
How do I make a sale?
Search returns:
SOP- Pipeline Board
SOP- Client outreach board
SOP- Target customers board

What are you trying to achieve

Better document identification and lower errors for deviating from standard processes
